LanguageData.VFEM2_Matting_.description: Rough matting made from interwoven leather pieces. It's rustic, cozy, and boosts the beauty of the room it's in. It's also quite flammable, and cleaning it is a laborious process.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Matting_.label: matting ({0})
LanguageData.VFEM2_FineMatting_.description: Luxurious, carefully stitched matting made from leather strips. Beautiful to look at, but cleaning it is a labor-intensive process.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FineMatting_.label: fine matting ({0})
